chatbot.helloMessage:
Hello and welcome to the virtual avatar of **David Vander Elst**.

Feel free to ask me questions about myself, my professional background, my expectations, my vision of the future, or any other topic related to my career as a developer.

I am here to help you get to know me better and assess whether I am the ideal candidate for your company before a real interview.

Don't hesitate to ask me specific questions or to request details about my past experiences.

I am open to discussion and ready to share my professional background with you! 😊
chatbot.messageLogWarning: Conversations are anonymous, recorded and only accessible by {{personName}}.

full.jobSearchReason: Why are you looking for a new position?
full.teamwork: How do you work with others?
full.futureVision: Where do you see yourself in a few years?
full.experience: Tell us about a relevant professional experience.

cv.downloadMyPdfCV: Download my resume on PDF format

footer.credits: Personal project — AI chatbot developed and deployed independently
